text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 154 

OPRTG_HSP_AMT 

LABEL: Operating Hospital Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The sum of the claim operating HSP amounts reported on the claims that comprise the stay. The 
operating HSP amount is used to identify the difference between the HSP rate payment (updated HSP x 
DRG weight) and the federal rate payment (includes DSH, IME, outliers, etc. as applicable) when HSP 
rate payment exceeds Federal rate
